book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. JOHN

verses.text: \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w the true\+w* \+w vine\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the husbandman\+w*.

\+w Every\+w* \+w branch\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w that beareth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w fruit\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w taketh away\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w every\+w* \+add branch\+add* \+w that beareth\+w* \+w fruit\+w*, \+w he purgeth\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w it may bring forth\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w fruit\+w*.
\+w Now\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w clean\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w I have spoken\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.

\+w Abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w you\+w*. \+w As\+w* \+w the branch\+w* \+w cannot\+w* \+w bear\+w* \+w fruit\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w itself\+w*, \+w except\+w* \+w it abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the vine\+w*; \+w no more can\+w* \+w ye\+w*, \+w except\+w* \+w ye abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w the vine\+w*, \+w ye\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the branches\+w*: He that \+w abideth\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w the same\+w* \+w bringeth forth\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w fruit\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w without\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w ye can\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w nothing\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w abide\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w he is cast\+w* \+w forth\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w a branch\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is withered\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w men gather\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w into\+w* \+w the fire\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w they are burned\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w ye abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w words\+w* \+w abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w ye shall ask\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye will\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w it shall be done\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.
\+w Herein\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w glorified\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye bear\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w fruit\+w*; \+w so\+w* \+w shall ye be\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w disciples\+w*.
\+w As\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w hath loved\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w so have I\+w* \+w loved\+w* \+w you\+w*: \+w continue ye\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w love\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w ye keep\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w commandments\+w*, \+w ye shall abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w love\+w*; \+w even as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have kept\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father’s\+w* \+w commandments\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w abide\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w love\+w*.

\+w These things\+w* \+w have I spoken\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w joy\+w* \+w might remain\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w your\+w* \+w joy\+w* \+w might be full\+w*.
\+w This\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w commandment\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w ye love\+w* \+w one another\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w I have loved\+w* \+w you\+w*.
\+w Greater\+w* \+w love\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w than this\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w lay down\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w friends\+w*.
\+w Ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w friends\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w ye do\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w command\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w Henceforth I call\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w servants\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w the servant\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w doeth\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w I have called\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w friends\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I have heard\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w I have made known\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.

\+w Ye have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w chosen\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have chosen\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ordained\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w should go\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w bring forth\+w* \+w fruit\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w your\+w* \+w fruit\+w* \+w should remain\+w*: \+w that\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w ye shall ask\+w* \+w of the Father\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w he may give it\+w* \+w you\+w*.
\+w These things\+w* \+w I command\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye love\+w* \+w one another\+w*.
\+w If\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w hate\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w ye know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it hated\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w before\+w* \+add it hated\+add* \+w you\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w ye were\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w the world\+w* \+w would love\+w* \+w his own\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w ye are\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have chosen\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w therefore\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w hateth\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w Remember\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w The servant\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w greater than\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w*. \+w If\+w* \+w they have persecuted\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w they will\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w persecute\+w* \+w you\+w*; \+w if\+w* \+w they have kept\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w saying\+w*, \+w they will keep\+w* \+w yours\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w will they do\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name’s sake\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w they know\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w that sent\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w I had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w spoken\+w* \+w unto them\+w*, \+w they had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w had\+w* \+w sin\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w now\+w* \+w they have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w cloke\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w sin\+w*.
\+w He\+w* \+w that hateth\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w hateth\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w I had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w done\+w* \+w among\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w the works\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w none\+w* \+w other man\+w* \+w did\+w*, \+w they had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w had\+w* \+w sin\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w now\+w* \+w have they\+w* \+w both\+w* \+w seen\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w hated\+w* \+w both\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+add this cometh to pass\+add*, \+w that\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w might be fulfilled\+w* \+w that is written\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w law\+w*, \+w They hated\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w without a cause\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w the Comforter\+w* \+w is come\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w will send\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+add even\+add* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w of truth\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w proceedeth\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w shall testify\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w me\+w*:
\+w And\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w shall bear witness\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w ye have been\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the beginning\+w*.
